keyPoints: Create a server program using socket programming to bind to a specific port.
Create a client program to connect to the server using its IP address and port.
Send messages from the client to the server using sendto() function.
Receive messages from the server to the client using recvfrom() function.
Display received messages on the client side using readline() function.
Handle errors and disconnections using error handling mechanisms.
Use select() function to handle multiple sockets.
Use threading to handle multiple clients simultaneously.
